"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 19:54 (UTC+3)'
# Keep original BEM-775 item, add normalized aliases to maximize compatibility with existing queue consumer.
items={
 'bem779_claude_dispatch_workflow_id.json': {'workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-779 normalized workflow_id dispatch to Claude dispatcher','created_at':created},
 'bem779_claude_dispatch_workflow_name.json': {'workflow_name':'Claude Internal Auditor Dispatcher','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-779 normalized workflow_name dispatch to Claude dispatcher','created_at':created},
 'bem779_claude_dispatch_direct_file.json': {'file':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-779 normalized file dispatch to Claude dispatcher','created_at':created}
}
created_files=[]
for name,data in items.items():
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue')/name
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v2',**data},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem779_verify_normalized_queue_items.md')
pending.write_text('# BEM-779 Next | Verify normalized queue items'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Next: run fresh Codex tick and verify workflow_dispatch_results / Claude runtime state.'+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-779 NORMALIZED QUEUE ITEMS'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Created normalized queue items for Claude dispatcher. Next: force Codex tick and verify dispatch results.'+sep+'Operator relay: forbidden.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'normalize_claude_dispatch_queue_item.v1','bem':'BEM-779','status':'normalized_queue_items_created','queue_files':created_files,'next_action':'fresh Codex tick then verify queue result/runtime/response','blocker':None,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem779_normalize_claude_dispatch_queue_item.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem779_normalize_claude_dispatch_queue_item.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-779 | Normalize Claude Dispatch Queue Item | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Queue files: '+str(len(created_files))+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem779_normalize_claude_dispatch_queue_item','status':'normalized_queue_items_created','queue_files':created_files,'blocker':None,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem779_normalize_claude_dispatch_queue_item.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-779 created normalized queue items: '+', '.join(created_files)+'\n')
changed_files.extend(created_files+[str(pending),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created normalized workflow dispatch queue items with workflow_id/workflow_name/file aliases for Claude dispatcher')
